"/home/bmo/BMO-Project/BMO Face Engine/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++" -O3 -DNDEBUG -sWASM=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sMIN_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sMAX_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sASYNCIFY -sASYNCIFY_STACK_SIZE=65536 -sENVIRONMENT=web -sASSERTIONS=1 "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['HEAPF32','ccall','cwrap']" --shell-file /tmp/bmo_speech_shell.html --pre-js /tmp/gamepad_fix.js --preload-file /tmp/bmo_speech_assets/assets@assets --preload-file /tmp/bmo_speech_assets/mouth_es.fs@mouth_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_speech_assets/visemes_database.txt@visemes_database.txt -sUSE_GLFW=3 CMakeFiles/BMO_Speech.dir/home/bmo/BMO-Project/BMO_Face_Engine/src/FaceEngineV2.cpp.o -o BMO_Speech.html  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a
